title: Minimum Insertion Steps to Make a String Palindrome
titleCn: 让字符串成为回文串的最少插入次数

testcases.input: s = "zzazz" Output: 0 Explanation: The string "zzazz" is already palindrome we do not need any insertions.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: The string "zzazz" is already palindrome we do not need any insertions.

testcases.input: s = "leetcode" Output: 5 Explanation: Inserting 5 characters the string becomes "leetcodocteel".
